owner.name: Rob Chambers
owner.tagline: A guide to working with me

sections.title: Working Hours & Days
sections.body:
## My typical working hours

- **Monday–Friday**: 09:00–17:30
- Usually online by 08:45, messages checked until 18:00
- Proper lunch break 12:30–13:30

sections.title: Communication Preferences
sections.body:
## How I prefer to communicate

- **Async first**: Slack over calls for non-urgent topics
- Short doc beats a long thread for complex discussions
- I respond within 4 hours during working hours

sections.title: Conditions I Like to Work In
sections.body:
## My ideal working environment

- Deep focus blocks in the morning, collaborative work in the afternoon
- Clear goals and minimal interruptions
- Background music helps me concentrate

sections.title: Things I Need
sections.body:
## What I need to do my best work

- Clear context when asking me to review something
- Advance notice for meetings where possible
- Psychological safety to ask questions

sections.title: Best Way to Receive Feedback
sections.body:
## How to give me feedback effectively

- Direct and specific is better than vague and gentle
- Written feedback I can reflect on works better than verbal-only
- I appreciate feedback as close to the event as possible

sections.title: Things I Love at Work
sections.body:
## What energises me at work

- Solving gnarly technical problems with a small team
- Mentoring and pair programming
- Clear documentation and well-named variables

sections.title: Things I Struggle With
sections.body:
## My known challenges

- Context-switching between many tasks in a single day
- Ambiguous requirements without a clear definition of done
- Very long meetings without a clear agenda

sections.title: What Gets Me Excited Outside of Work
sections.body:
## My interests outside work

- Hiking and wild swimming
- Reading science fiction
- Tinkering with home automation projects

sections.title: Top 5 Films
sections.body:
## My all-time favourite films

1. *2001: A Space Odyssey* (1968)
2. *Blade Runner* (1982)
3. *Arrival* (2016)
4. *The Shawshank Redemption* (1994)
5. *Spirited Away* (2001)

sections.title: Favourite Cheese
sections.body:
## Cheeses I hold dear

- **Cheddar** — the undisputed classic; mature, sharp, reliable
- Brie is acceptable in a sandwich emergency

sections.title: Any Other Interesting Fact
sections.body:
## Something you might not know about me

- I once cycled from London to Paris in three days
- I can solve a Rubik's cube in under two minutes
- Strong opinions about the correct way to load a dishwasher

sections.title: Favourite Joke
sections.body:
## My go-to joke

> Why do programmers prefer dark mode?
>
> Because light attracts bugs.
